agents.name: TJ Verdiglione
agents.title: Licensed Real Estate Salesperson
agents.bio: TJ Verdiglione is a top-producing luxury real estate specialist with Douglas Elliman, with deep expertise in the South Florida market and a track record of representing the most exclusive pre-construction developments in the region.

agents.name: Nicole Melveney
agents.title: Licensed Real Estate Salesperson
agents.bio: Nicole Melveney brings extensive experience in luxury residential real estate to Casa Avenida, offering buyers a seamless and sophisticated acquisition experience from initial inquiry through closing.
